Acid Arrow.effect: Hits unerringly, d6 magic piercing. Then d4 acid at STT (CS neg, repeat 17CS).

Alarm.effect: Bell in head if undesignated creature crosses within 5'. One at a time.

Alter Self.effect: Transform into humanoid. Add one feature (+1 dmg unarmed, gills, +1 AC, etc.).

Animate Dead.effect: Animate as zombie/skeleton under command. Crumbles after.

Antimagic Shell.effect: No spells, magic items/spells have no effect in area.

Arcane Eye.effect: Invisible eye. Action to move 30' and see through. Can't see in dark.

Augury.effect: Ask GM about planned action: weal or woe.

Blade Barrier.effect: Wall of blades, cover, difficult terrain. 8d6 slashing (15DS half) on enter/start turn.

Blade Ward.effect: DA to physical attacks against you.

Bless.effect: Target gains AD for attacks and saves.

Burning Hands.effect: d6 fire (DS half). Ignite untended flammable.

Chain Lightning.effect: Line changes direction at each creature. 8d6 lightning (DS half (DA metal armor)).

Charm Person.effect: Regards as friend (ChS neg, repeat 16ChS 1/hr). Ends if notices harm.

Cleansing Weapons.effect: Weapons magical, +1 atk/dmg, +d4 radiant (+1 vs fiend/undead). Additive.

Cloudkill.effect: 3d6 poison (CS half). Moves 30' toward low terrain at SYT. 0hp = die. Blocks LoS.

Command.target: Creature you see that hears you
Command.effect: One-word command (WS neg, repeat 18WS) (AD if harmful).

Commune.effect: Up to 3 yes/no questions answered truthfully. 2+ in 24hr: failed = mishap.

Cone of Cold.effect: 6d6 cold and -10' speed til ET (CS half, no speed reduction).

Confusion.effect: Confused: random movement, attack random targets (WS neg, repeat 19WS).

Control Water.effect: Change shape, part, flow of water in range.

Create Undead.effect: Summon wight or wraith. 2+ in 24hr: failed = mishap.

Darkness.effect: No creature can see in area. Light sources extinguished.

Delayed Blast Fireball.effect: 8d6 fire (DS half). Ignite flammable. Can focus to delay up to 1 min.

Detect Magic.effect: Sense magic within LoE. Study item (Action) to discern properties.

Detect Thoughts.effect: Learn target's immediate thoughts (WS neg, repeat 17WS). Target notices on success.

Dimension Door.effect: Teleport to any space you see or describe within 500'. Can bring one willing creature.

Dishearten.effect: d8 psychic (ChS half). Free cast (no action) when target rolls nat 1, with AD.

Disintegrate.effect: 8d8 damage (CS half). If 0hp, kill. Disintegrate 10' cube object.

Dispel Magic.target: Creature or spell effect you see
Dispel Magic.effect: End one magic effect on a creature or in an area.

Divine Word.effect: 0-20hp: destroy (ChS neg). 21-40hp: stun (ChS neg, repeat 20ChS). 41+hp: daze (ChS neg, repeat 20ChS). Not home plane: banish 8hr (ChS neg).

Dominion.effect: Summon servant of your god, your level or lower. Acts with free will to aid. 2+ in 24hr: mishap.

Earthquake.effect: Prone all (DS neg, repeat 16 SYT). 50 dmg to 1 structure/turn. Open 1 fissure/turn (16DS or fall).

Fabricate.effect: Turn raw materials into finished object up to 30'. Reverts when spell ends.

Fascinate.effect: Stunned (ChS neg, repeat 18ChS). Free save with AD when damaged.

Feather Fall.effect: Slow descent to 60'/round. Can cast without action when you fall.

Final Rest.effect: 3d8 radiant (WS half). Undead at half hp or less: destroyed (unless end effect).

Fire Bolt.effect: If cast check hits AC, d8 fire. Ignite untended flammable.

Flame Strike.effect: 3d6 fire + 3d6 radiant (DS half (DA fiend/undead)). Ignite flammable.

Flaming Sphere.effect: 5' sphere. 2d6 fire to rammed creatures (17DS half). d6 fire to adjacent at end turn. Move 30' free. Sheds light 20'.

Floating Disk.effect: Carries 10 slots. Hovers waist level, stays within 10'. Falls and ends at drops of 10'+.

Fly.effect: Fly speed 50' (or walk if higher) and hover. Drifts safely when ends.

Gaseous Form.effect: Fly speed = walk, must stay adjacent ground/water. Pass through non-airtight gaps. Sense 30'. Can't cast/attack.

Gate.effect: Planar portal. Summon creature up to 2x your level. Acts begrudgingly. Free on lost focus. 2+ in 24hr: mishap.

Harmonic Healing.target: Creature that hears or is touched

Heal.effect: Heal to full hp. Remove all disease and poison.

Hold Portal.effect: Portal closes and held shut. 21SC to open (breaking parts). Knock ends.

Holy Weapons.effect: Weapons magical, +1 atk/dmg. Additive with existing.

Illusion.effect: Visual+audible illusion. Creatures react as real. 18WS to see through (auto if physical interact).

Inspire.effect: Target gains luck token. Free cast (no action) on target nat 20, with AD.

Invisibility.effect: Target and held items invisible. Dropped items visible. Picked items stay visible. Ends on attack/damage/cast.

Knock.effect: End hold portal, undo all locks/bars, portal opens. Loud knock.

Levitate.effect: Hover in place, move up to 20' up/down as move. Push along objects to move horizontally.

Light.effect: Object glows with bright, heatless light. Illuminates 30' radius.

Magic Circle.effect: Chosen creature type can't enter, attack inside, or target spells inside/overlapping.

Magic Missile.effect: 1+1/EL bolts, each d4 force (no save). Divide among multiple targets.

Mass Heal.effect: Heal to full hp. Remove all disease and poison.

Maze.effect: Banish to labyrinth plane (IS neg, repeat 21IS). Returns on successful save. 2+ on same target in 24hr: mishap.

Mend.effect: Repair single break or tear (up to 1' max).

Mind Sliver.effect: d8 psychic (IS half (DA if focusing)). Simple minded (Int<0) reduce damage by their Int.

Minor Illusion.effect: Sound or static image. 16WS to see through (auto if physical interact).

Mirror Image.effect: 3 duplicates. Proportional random chance attack targets duplicate instead. Unaffected by AoE.

Misty Step.effect: Teleport to space you see within 30'.

Passwall.effect: Tunnel your size up to 30' long through wall.

Pillar of Salt.effect: Petrified (WS neg, repeat 19WS). Your level or lower, fail by 10: permanent.

Plane Shift.effect: Shift to another plane. Location is analogous.

Poison Spray.effect: d8 poison (CS half). Can target concealed/invisible creature not hiding from you.

Polymorph.duration: Focus (up to 1 hour) or Save Ends
Polymorph.effect: Becomes humanoid/beast of level <= yours or target's. Gear melds. Revert at 0hp. Resist: CS neg, repeat 19CS. Fail by 10: can make permanent.

Power Word Kill.target: Creature you see or true name
Power Word Kill.effect: 10d8 damage and stun (WS half, no stun (DA if true name), repeat 21WS). 0hp = die. True name: target without seeing.

Power Word Stun.target: Creature you see or true name
Power Word Stun.effect: 6d8 damage and stun (WS half, no stun (DA if true name), repeat 20WS). True name: target without seeing.

Prestidigitation.effect: Minor magic: sensory effect, light/snuff fire, clean/soil, chill/warm/flavor, mark, or trinket/image til EYNT. Up to 3 active.

Prismatic Spray.effect: 6d6 psychic and daze (DS half, no daze, repeat 20DS).

Prophecy.effect: AD all atk/chk/save. Others have DA to attack or harmful spell. 2+ in 24hr: mishap.

Protection from Evil.effect: Evil beings have DA on atk/cast vs target. Can't possess/compel/beguile. Cast on possessed: cast out (ChS neg).

Protection From Energy.effect: Immune to one chosen energy: acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison, or thunder.

Rally.target: Allies who see or hear you
Rally.effect: Heal d4+d4/EL hp and gain a luck token.

Ray of Frost.effect: If cast check hits AC, d8 cold and -10' speed til ET (doesn't stack).

Rebuke Unholy.effect: Choose good/evil/lawful/chaotic (not your own). Matching creatures flee (ChS neg, repeat 18ChS). Your level or lower, extraplanar, fail by 10: banished. Cornered: fight with DA.

Regenerate.effect: d6 hp now, +d6 hp at SYT. Full hp = lost parts regrown. Ends at full hp or lose touch/focus.

Resilient Sphere.duration: Focus (up to 1 hour) or Save Ends
Resilient Sphere.effect: Impenetrable sphere. Unwilling: IS neg, repeat 19IS. Nothing passes through. Moves with target.

Restoration.effect: End one curse, disease, or poison.

Reverse Gravity.effect: Gravity reversed. Max height 65'. Creatures fall up.

Scrying.target: Creature or location you have seen
Scrying.duration: Focus (up to 1 hour) or Save Ends
Scrying.effect: Scry on target (WS neg, repeat 20WS). Your level or lower, fail by 10: unaware and lasts full duration.

Sending.effect: Send mental message to any creature you have seen on same plane.

Shapechange.duration: Focus (up to 1 hour) or Save Ends
Shapechange.effect: Becomes creature of level <= yours or target's. Gear melds. Revert at 0hp. Resist: CS neg, repeat 21CS. Fail by 10: can make permanent.

Shatter.effect: 2d6 thunder (CS half (DA construct)). Audible 100'+. GM may check random encounter.

Shocking Grasp.effect: If cast check hits AC, d8 lightning. +1 lightning vs metal armor.

Silence.effect: No sound emanates from or passes through area.

Sleep.effect: Fall asleep and prone (WS neg). Shaking (action), injury, or 8hr wakes. L3+: take 5 dmg to end (free).

Smite.effect: Cast on melee hit (exception to one action). Normal damage + 2d8 radiant (WS half (DA fiend/undead)).

Speak with Dead.effect: Ask up to 3 questions answered briefly per target's knowledge when alive.

Spider Climb.effect: Climb speed = walk speed. Can hang upside down.

Stoneskin.effect: Speed halved. Immune poison. Resist all other damage.

Summon Extraplanar.effect: Summon creature your level or lower. True name for specific. Begrudging. Free on lost focus. 2+ in 24hr: mishap.

Sunburst.effect: 10d6 radiant (WS half). Undead at half hp: destroyed. Extraplanar at half hp: banished.

Symphony.effect: Stunned (ChS neg, repeat 21ChS). Free save with AD when damaged.

Telekinesis.duration: Focus (up to 10 min) and Save Ends
Telekinesis.effect: Paralyze (SS neg, repeat 20SS). Move target 30' any direction as move action.

Teleport.effect: Arrive at location on same plane you've seen, or near object/creature you've seen, or by distance/direction. Arrive safely.

Thaumaturgy.effect: Minor wonder: boom voice (AD Int), flicker flames, tremors, sound, open/slam door/window, alter eyes. Up to 3 active.

Time Stop.effect: Time stops for all but you. Cast on self, use/manipulate your gear or untended objects. Duration spells affect others when time resumes.

True Seeing.effect: Truesight 90'. See in darkness, invisible, illusions, true forms, Ethereal Plane.

Turn Undead.effect: Flee (ChS neg, repeat 16ChS). Your level or lower, fail by 10: destroyed. Cornered: fight with DA.

Wall of Force.effect: Thin impenetrable transparent wall up to 30'x30'. Nothing passes through. Not affected by Dispel Magic.

Web.effect: Restrain (SS neg, repeat 17SS). Difficult terrain. Block LoE. Fire: burn and d6 fire to all (17DS half).

Wish.effect: Duplicate any spell SL5 or lower. Or with effort: create 25000gp object, heal 8 creatures to full, grant resist all 8hr, grant immunity to 1 spell 8hr, or grant proficiency 8hr. After: hp max halved til rest, failed retain = never cast again.

Wrath.effect: Weapons magical, +2 atk/dmg, +d6 radiant (+2 vs fiend/undead). Additive.

Zone of Truth.effect: Creatures cannot utter deliberate lies in area.
